messages.message: I will not attack you if you do not interfere with my move into Tuscany.
I intend to take Tuscany. You can either stay out of the way or face me there.

This seems like a fairly standard message to start a conversation. Would you be willing to set up a DMZ? I feel like it could be in our best interests to be friends so we don't have to devote troops to stalemating each other.

Hi France!
Just wanted to say hi and say that I think we'd do well to establish comms early on. I'll be honest, I generally favor FG as either France or Germany as we can gain a lot from working together and keep England out of the North and Scandinavia.
Let me know what you think - and I'm always happy to keep communication open!
I will not interfere with your southern border if you allow me Tuscany uncontested.
Hey Russia! Would you be interested in running a Juggernaut? I reckon we could really help each other out throughout the game if we worked together.

Hi England!
Just wanted to say hi and say that I think we'd do well to establish comms early on. I'll be honest, I generally favor EG as either England or Germany as we can gain a lot from working together and keep France out of the North and Scandinavia.
Let me know what you think - and I'm always happy to keep communication open!
If you send forces toward Tuscany, my army from Venice will block you.
I'm inclined to agree. I hate having to devote resources to a stalemate with Germany early on.
Tuscany is yours.

Hi Italy!
Just wanted to say hi and say that I think we'd do well to establish comms early on. I'll be honest, I generally favor cooperation between Italy and Germany as we can each be very useful to one another.
Let me know what you think - and I'm always happy to keep communication open!

Hi Russia!
Just wanted to say hi and say that I think we'd do well to establish comms early on. I'll be honest, I generally favor cooperation between Russia and Germany as we can each be very useful to one another.
Let me know what you think - and I'm always happy to keep communication open!
I will move into Tuscany this turn. If you wish to avoid conflict, do not support any units there.
I will not interfere with your plans if you do not obstruct my expansion.

Hey Turkey! I do really like the Juggernaut, it is easily my favourite alliance to play and I've never seen it destroyed so I'd definitely be down for it. I think it will be a lot of fun and I do think that it can make us very dominant in the east if we work together from the very start.

To show that I'm committed to an alliance, I'm down for a DMZ in the Black Sea if you are, but if you want to bounce I'm open to either option.
Tuscany is mine. I expect you to honor that. No further interference.

Hey Italy! That message is a bit confusing, but I hope we can still find a way to work together. I'd prefer if you didn't move to Tyr/ven/apu this turn, but if you do want to do that I would be okay with you getting Tunis. I'd just like to know that you aren't going to attack me while I'm occupied with Turkey, since that'd be a bit of a setback to both of us.

Hi Turkey!
Just wanted to say hi and say that I think we'd do well to establish comms early on. I'll be honest, I generally favor cooperation between Turkey and Germany as we can each be very useful to one another.
Let me know what you think - and I'm always happy to keep communication open!

Well I certainly won't.
My plans, naturally, are to secure Den and Hol this year and see where things go from there.
I would be fine with that if we can set up a Piedmont DMZ.

I'd definitely prefer a bounce in the Black Sea as then I can grab Bulgaria with my fleet and be able to get into Aegean Sea in Autumn. I have the same thoughts though, I think it would benefit us both a lot if we worked together!
I agree, and I'd love to avoid it entirely if we can. Have you heard from England at all?
I have no interest in long talks. If you do not interfere with my moves, I will not interfere with yours.

Hey Austria!

I want to wish you good luck in this game and I hope we can find a way to work together. I really think that Austria and Russia have a lot of potential to become strong allies if we can prevent unnecessary tension in the east and focus on pushing west together. Let me know what you think of this idea and I'd be very happy to work together.
Agreed, we could definitely help each other out a lot! I'll let you know if I hear anything from Austria or Russia that might be relevant to you and hope you can do the same :)
I will not attack you. I only want Tuscany. Your focus on Turkey is fine. I will respect your neutrality if you do not challenge me.
Not yet
A DMZ in Piedmont is unnecessary. I am only moving into Tuscany. If you do not interfere, there will be no conflict.
Sounds good to me! I think a bounce is probably the safest option for us so we can play it off as a lack of trust rather than blatant cooperation.

Hey Russia!

Yes I agree that an alliance would benefit both of us. If you can keep the English fleet in the North and out of Norway/sweden we should be in a good position to take out Turkey fairly easily. I'll move to Serbia and would be happy to support you to Rumania, or bounce Turkey in Greece if you'd prefer that.

Hey England, I really hope that we can find a way to work together in this game. I think that we can definitely help each other out by avoiding conflict in the north, especially in Scandinavia. We have some good opportunities to share information and work together strategically. Please let me know if there's anything you want to discuss, I look forward to working with you!
I will occupy Tuscany this turn. If your army moves toward it, I will treat it as an act of aggression.
I will not move beyond Tuscany unless provoked. Your forces in Trieste will not be challenged.

I think an early focus on Turkey is a good plan, he's been talking to me about opening with a Juggernaut and I'm down for it for now so I'm not sure whether I'll be able to maintain that agreement once Turkey is out of the picture.

Hi Austria!
I think we both know that we can work together and we can be very useful to one another.
I'm also interested in establishing early comms to share information. Have you heard from anyone else at all?
I suggest you focus eastward. My moves are limited to Tuscany and will not interfere with your interests.

Sounds good!
I haven't heard anything from either of them yet - have you heard anything?

Hey Germany!

I completely agree, I think that Germany and Russia tend to get destroyed when they end up fighting early in the game. I'm hoping that we can keep our relations peaceful and to avoid conflict in the north if possible.

So what are you thinking for Scandinavia this year? I think it might be best for me to open north with my army and take Sweden, but that could also cause a lot of tension between us so I'm not sure which route would be best. What do you think?

Hi Germany,
Agreed!
I generally am too, but on another note, I hate seeing Russia steamroll Turkey in a juggernaut. Can we get that to not happen this game?
I will not move into Tyr/Ven/Apu this turn. I only want Tuscany. If you do not interfere, I will not interfere with your operations.

Hey Russia!

Yes I agree that an alliance would benefit both of us. If you can keep the English fleet in the North and out of Norway/sweden we should be in a good position to take out Turkey fairly easily. I'll move to Serbia and would be happy to support you to Rumania, or bounce Turkey in Greece if you'd prefer that.

Sounds good.
Have you heard from Austria at all?

Hi Russia,
Sounds great to me. You don't build in St. Petersburg and I won't convoy an army to Norway. That will be the extent of my forces in the north.
I will occupy Tuscany this turn. If your army moves toward it, I will treat it as an act of aggression. No DMZ will stop me.

I haven't heard anything from Austria which is worrying me a little. Russia and I have agreed to bounce in the Black Sea for this turn, but I think I'm probably going to have to be defensive from there.

Hey Germany! Yes I'd be very happy to work together.

Right now Italy has only said they'll stay out of Tyr/ven/apu, but if they move into Tyr/ven or Tus (or both) I'll assume they're attacking me.

Have you heard anything yet?

Hey France,

I just wanted to wish you good luck in this game. I think we have a lot of potential to work together and a lot of opportunities to share information and work together strategically. Let me know if there's anything you want to discuss and I look forward to working with you.
Your focus on Den/Hol is fine. I will not interfere with your plans, so long as you do not obstruct my control of Tuscany.

Hey Italy, I just wanted to wish you good luck in this game. We don't really have any conflicts that we can work together on but I'm always happy to share information or to work together strategically. I hope we can find a way to work together in the near future and let me know if there's anything you want to discuss.
Will do
Absolutely. What are your thoughts on Austria? I haven't heard anything from them and I'm not sure what to make of it.

Hi France,
I'm hoping we can be friends this game. A fight between us won't get us very far and will result in a very large German power with a back door to you in the long run.

Yeah that's probably wise.
I heard from Austria too - I'm not sure if they intend to attack me or not. I'll try and feel them out.

Hey England!

I think we both know that we can work together and we can be very useful to one another. I'm also interested in establishing early comms to share information. Have you heard from anyone else at all?
I'm fine with that. Have you spoken to Germany?
Sounds good to me, I'm happy with that arrangement.

Hi Austria,
I've heard from Germany and Russia. So far, Germany and Russia don't want me to attack Russia, which probably means they are going to attack you, or possibly team up against me. What have you heard from the others?
That's fair.
If you could convince England to focus on France it'd be good for both of us and would prevent them from becoming too powerful.
Will do. Have you heard from England at all?

I'm really liking this plan so far, I think it could work out very well.

So I want to avoid conflict between us, do you think we can leave Galicia DMZ? I'm happy to bounce if you'd prefer, but I'd like us to open west together. I think that if we can do that then we can dominate Turkey pretty quickly and go from there. What do you think?

Italy is telling me that they have no intention of attacking you (understandably).
I'd be wary of them though, as I've heard that they intend to move to Tuscany and I wouldn't be surprised if they moved Rom-ven.
Hey France! Just wanted to check in and see how you were doing. I know we're on opposite sides of the map but I think we can still be helpful to each other. Have you heard anything yet?
Tuscany is occupied this turn. No further interference expected.
Yes. He seems very friendly and wants to DMZ Ruhr, but I haven't heard much more than that. I'll let you know if I hear anything else.

Yeah, he wants peace in Scandinavia and is willing to DMZ the north if I leave my army out of St.p.

I really think that England and France can work well together, but I'm not sure how you want to approach this game. What are your thoughts?

Yeah, it'd be nice to get my fleet to Greece but it'll have to wait until Spring '02. I'd also prefer to leave Galicia as a DMZ, but I'm open to doing a bounce there if you'd prefer to start as allies off on a bad foot.
I will hold Tuscany. No aggression toward you unless you act.
I haven't had much success in communicating with England, but we'll see how that goes.
Same. Italy tells me they're moving to Tus but I'm still not sure if I believe them.
Hey Turkey! Just wanted to check in and see how you're doing. Have you heard anything from anyone else yet?
Great
Just initial greetings so far. How are you feeling about Italy?
Your neutrality on Tuscany is noted. I suggest you focus east.
Italy has been pretty quiet towards me, so I'm not sure if they're trying to attack me or just playing very defensively, but I haven't heard anything from them suggesting they intend to attack you.
That seems like an accurate representation of the situation.
Tuscany is occupied. Your acknowledgment is noted. Keep your forces south of the Alps.

Ok, let's go ahead and DMZ Galicia then. I've already agreed to a bounce in the Black Sea so I won't be able to do too much to avoid attacking Turkey in 1901, but that will be resolved next year so that won't be a problem.
Sounds good
Ok that sounds good. I think an early conflict between us would be pointless.

Yeah I wouldn't be surprised.
What are your plans this year?

Thanks for the info. I've heard from Russia, but not Germany. Russia's been suggesting that they'd like to ally with me and focus on taking out Turkey, and I have no reason to disbelieve them since that's a standard Russian opening.
Great, best of luck!
I certainly don't intend to. What are your plans this year?
I haven't heard anything from them, but I feel like they're gearing up for a fight with either you or me.
Tuscany is mine now. Keep your word and keep your forces south of the Alps.
This year I want to focus on getting some Scs and hopefully keep Turkey from attacking me. Have you heard anything from them yet?
And don't worry I'm not going to Tuscony.

Hi Russia!
I agree, I think that we'd both do best to establish comms early on and work together as much as possible.
I'm a bit apprehensive about you opening north, but I'll have to see what happens.
I generally try to avoid conflict in Scandinavia but we'll see where things go.
Hmm, they messaged me as well. I think that at the very least they're being non-committal, which is good news for us
Sounds good. I'm going to bounce in Galicia, and I'll also move to Serbia.
Great, this should be a good first step for us.

Yeah, they are telling me that they aren't sure if they'll bounce in Black Sea or not, and that they haven't heard from Russia yet.
If Russia doesn't move to Galicia, you might be able to deny them Rum.
Not sure what your plans are - but let me know if you need any help.
Agreed. Let's keep our focus elsewhere. I'll hold Tuscany, you hold Trieste.
How are you planning to open?
Tuscany is mine now. I suggest you keep your forces south of the Alps and avoid interference.
Sounds good.
Are you going to try and take Greece?
Sounds good
So far so good, I'm pretty happy about how things are going in the north.
Have you heard anything from Italy? I don't think they're going to attack me but it would be nice to know if they're planning on heading towards you.
Will do.
I have no interest in Greece. My focus is Tuscany and securing my flank. I suggest you do the same.
Have you heard much from Italy?
I'm thinking to open fairly neutrally, but if things go well with England I wouldn't be opposed to working together.
Yeah, I hate seeing Turkey steamroll Russia in a juggernaut. Can we make sure that doesn't happen?
Hey Austria! How're you doing? I'm doing well thanks, what are your thoughts on the game so far?
Your assurance is noted. I will assume your army stays south of the Alps. If you renege, I will act accordingly.
Yeah I've heard a little from Italy. They said they were holding in Ven but I'm not sure if I believe them.
Sounds good to me, best of luck.
I have no interest in Greece. My focus is securing Tuscany and expanding southward. I suggest you keep your plans eastward.
Hey Italy! How are you doing? What are your thoughts on the game so far?
Yeah I'll be doing my best to prevent that. I have no idea how much Russia trusts Turkey, so hopefully that will make it easy for us.
Yeah, that's a pretty weird thing to say to a Russia, you would think that they would want to avoid a juggernaut more than a bounce in Venice.
They told me they're going for the Balkans. I haven't heard anything about their relationship with Turkey.
Right. I think it's safe to assume that they'll be moving Rom-ven. I think we'll be okay though.
Same to you!

Fair enough, I think I'll be focusing in the south for now but I'll let you know if I decide to open north.

Best of luck.
Thanks!
I focus on the west. My interests lie in Tuscany and securing my southern flank. We will not interfere with each other.
Go for Norway and Belgium. Hopefully Russia opens south so I can take St. Petersburg. You?
It's been pretty good so far. I've heard from Russia and Italy. So far it seems like Russia is planning on focusing on the North and Italy seems to want to be neutral with me. What are your thoughts?
Yeah, it's always best to assume the worst from people, better safe than sorry.
Agreed
I have no interest in Greece. Focus on your eastern front—I will secure Tuscany and nothing more.
I am focused on securing Tuscany and my southern flank. We have no direct conflicts—I suggest you keep your focus eastward.
Noted
Have you heard anything from Turkey?
Yeah, hopefully.
You seem to be sending me the same message a lot.
Alright sounds good
Have you heard from Turkey?
Repetition is clarity. Tuscany is mine. Your neutrality is appreciated.
I think they're going to open pretty standard, but I've heard that Italy is planning on attacking them so that could be something to watch out for.
Sounds good!
Have you heard anything?
That's good to hear about Russia. I haven't heard much about Italy, but I have heard that Russia is planning on attacking you, so watch out.
Ok.
Same
I haven't heard anything about Italy attacking them. Austria says that they've been talking to Italy and they're trying to stay neutral for now.
Ok thanks for the heads up!
Russia seems pretty confident they're going south, so you might be good on that front.
Not much, we've only talked about bouncing in the Black Sea.
Okay thanks for the heads up.
Sure thing :)
Interesting, I haven't heard much from them. I'll try to feel them out.
Interesting. I haven't heard much from them at all.
Austria says that they haven't heard much from Italy.
Yeah I'm not sure what to make of that. Italy only told me that they're staying in Tuscany though
Hey Germany! How're you doing? I've heard that Italy is planning on attacking Austria, so they may be leaving themselves open to an attack from you or France.
Yeah, it's strange. I haven't heard much from Italy either.
Hey, Italy, I know it's pretty early in the game but I just wanted to reach out again and see what your plans are for this year. I'm happy to work together if we can find a way to work together.
It seems strange that they wouldn't say anything to you but they're happy to stay neutral with Austria. Have you heard anything from Italy?
Have you heard anything from Italy?
All I've heard is that they're going south
How about you?
What are your plans for this game? I'm not interested in moving into Piedmont or the Mediterranean right now
Yes I've heard from them, they haven't said anything about you or Italy though.
I think I'm going to open south to avoid arousing suspicion from Turkey.

Hi Turkey,
Not much to talk about with us now, but if you end up attacking Russia, I might be able to help in the north.
Nothing from Turkey yet
Hey England! I think that would be good, I'm worried about Russia at the moment so anything you could do to stop their expansion would be greatly appreciated.
Hmm, interesting. Thanks for the heads up!
No problem :)
Ok
Hey France! How're you doing? What are your thoughts on the game so far?
I'm doing well, how about you? Any thoughts on the Balkans so far?
Has Austria expressed any interest in Greece?
Have you made contact with England at all? I haven't heard much from them.
They're telling me they want peace between us. What are your thoughts on Belgium?
Also, have you spoken with Italy at all?
Not much beyond saying they'd like to work with me, no specifics.
You seem to be sending me a lot of the same message - do you mean to?
That's good to hear! Yes, I've spoken to Austria, they've seemed to indicate that they want to be neutral with me.
They're being aggressive with me, so be prepared for a Russia/italy alliance against you.
That's good to know, thank you! I'm hoping that I can be friends with Russia for the time being but I'll be prepared to change plans if I need to
Have you talked about Belgium at all?
Okay, I think Austria is somewhat wary of them.

Hi Italy,
Have you heard from Germany yet? I think he and France might be working together.

Yeah, they said that they're "focused on securing their southern flank" and that they're "unsure of Austria" but they've suggested I focus my attention to the east. Have you heard anything from Austria?
Ok, I'll keep that in mind
Well if you help me into Belgium I will open north to stop a possible Russian juggernaut.
I would be down with that.
Just trying to figure out what they're going to do - I asked if they'd try to deny Russia Rum and they haven't responded.
Sure thing
Yeah I'm definitely planning to, they seem suspicious of me for some reason.
Yeah they seem suspicious of everyone for some reason... it's not a good sign for them.
Great. Let's see what he does.
Yeah, we'll just have to wait and see
Thanks for the heads up
Have you heard anything from France or England?
Have you heard anything from France or Germany?
Germany is being non-committal, but I think he's willing to work with me. I'm not sure about France yet.
Ok thanks for letting me know. Yeah France doesn't seem to have many friends at the moment
Yeah
So far I've heard that Italy is going to be attacking Austria, but other than that I don't have much info
Okay
Well that's good for you.
Nothing from them, really strange.
Pretty nice opening for you though.
Thanks. Have you spoken to Germany at all?

So it looks like we're in a really good position here, as long as we can keep Turkey under control we should be able to destroy them pretty quickly. What are your plans for this year?

Have you heard anything from Italy?
Also do you want to bounce in Galicia again?
Not much. They both seem very reserved and noncommittal.

Hey Russia - sorry about the late reply. Things worked out though!
What are your thoughts on Scandinavia for this year?
I agree we're in a good position. I'm happy for Gal to be a DMZ. I'd like to take Greece and use Serbia to support you into Rumania.
Do you think Russia and Turkey are cooperating?
Not much, we agreed to stay out of each other's way in Scandinavia.
Lol no. I was trying to coordinate with Turkey but haven't heard back from them yet. I think it's still early so I'm not sure.

Sounds good, I'm happy that things worked out!

I was thinking that I might focus south but I'm open to suggestion if you have another idea. What do you think?
Also why didn't you move Berlin to Kiel?
What are you doing? You have already lost this game. You're going to get zero builds, and Austria will take Venice from you next year.
Have you heard anything from Germany?
Sounds good, I'm planning to move to Rumania with Ukraine.
It looks like you're going to have your hands full in the south. Is there anything you would like me to do?
No, I haven't. I'm trying to figure out what's happening in the west.
So do you want to bounce in Galicia again?
Sure.
Yeah. It looks like they're just going for the standard Scs but I'm not sure why they didn't move Berlin to Kiel.
Not really, I was thinking that we might be able to work together to attack Germany at some point in the future.
Sounds good, thanks.
Agreed
Are you planning to let me into Sweden?
Yes that's fair enough. France doesn't seem to have many friends at the moment.
Hey France, how's your relationship with Italy?
France is likely to cover Brest with MAO, so I think we can get you Belgium.
I'm unsure. They've told me they're going into Tuscany, and then they didn't.
What's your relationship with Germany like?
Well, Austria's not going to last too long I think
We haven't talked much, I assume he's not planning to bounce me out of Sweden based on his moves, but I don't really have anything from him so I'm not sure.
To secure Holland and also free up Kiel for a fleet
What are your thoughts for this turn?
Why do you say that?
Fair.
Tuscany is secured. Your compliance is noted. Keep your word.
I'll take Belgium then.
Our mutual non-interference is acknowledged. Stay east—I stay west.
I'm planning to move to Rumania and see if I can get Sweden. Have you decided how to move with the Black Sea?

That sounds good to me.
I'm definitely planning to let you into Sweden!
Yeah. They told me they weren't planning on it but I don't think they're in a position to do so.
Ah fair enough
Yeah, he just told me that he's planning to let me into Sweden, so I'm inclined to believe him.
I haven't breached the terms of our agreement
I'm not sure what you're trying to say?
I have no interest in your predictions. My fleet stays in ION. Your focus should be on your own borders.
Your word means nothing. Prepare to defend your southern flank. My army moves to PIE.
I haven't heard anything from Austria and the moves suggest an attack from Russia and Italy
Then prepare to get wrecked
Thanks, I appreciate it.
You already said your word means nothing
Ok sounds good
I don't think you have to worry about Austria attacking you. They're more worried about Russia and Italy.
You heard me. Stay east. I have no quarrel with you—if you respect the line.
Your threats are empty. My army moves to PIE. Your supply centers are next.
No problem!
Seems like you're lacking a bit of foresight
Foresight is irrelevant if you cannot stop my army from reaching PIE. My fleet holds ION. Your supply centers are next.
You know, I don't have anything from Italy either.
My army moves to PIE. Your threats mean nothing if you cannot stop it.
Hmm okay, I suppose we'll see
Ok
Foresight is irrelevant if you cannot stop my army from reaching PIE. My fleet holds ION. Your supply centers are next.
Yeah, I guess they're just playing it safe
Ok. Do you have any idea what Germany is doing?
Your word means nothing, but my army moving to PIE means everything. MAR and BRE will fall if you leave them exposed.
Yeah. I'm assuming you're taking Bul with the fleet?
Germany’s moves are their own concern. I will hold ION and advance into France. Keep your focus east.
Have you heard anything from Turkey?
I'm planning on it yeah
Foresight is irrelevant if you cannot stop my army from reaching PIE. My fleet holds ION. Your supply centers are next.
Ah, ok.
We'll see about that
Germany’s moves are their own concern. I will hold ION and advance into France. Keep your focus east.

Cool. Austria is asking me if I heard from you.
Not sure what they want me to tell them
Foresight is irrelevant if you cannot stop my army from reaching PIE. My fleet holds ION. Your supply centers are next.
PIE is mine. Your options narrow. MAR and BRE are next unless you divert resources—choice is yours.
I'm not sure what they want either. We might just have to wait and see this turn I guess.
Not much recently, what about you?
I do not seek conflict with you. If you move toward Galicia, I will not hinder you. Leave me to my west.
Ok
Your westward focus is noted. We may find mutual interest later. For now, I will take what I need from France.
I'll just play along.
Cool, thanks
PIE is moving. MAR and BRE will fall if you leave them open. Your word means nothing if your armies do not act.
Yeah, I'm expecting that.
I'm not sure if they're planning to go for me or Russia. I think I'll try to bounce with them in Greece.
Austria's moves suggest an attack on Italy and Italy's moves suggest an attack on Austria, so I'm not sure if we have to worry about them anymore.

Yeah that's fine.
I have no interest in antagonizing you.
I'll be moving to Greece and Galicia again, fyi
You heard me. Stay east. My fleet holds ION—I expect your fleets to stay out of my waters.
That sounds like a good plan to me.
If you press into Galicia, I will not interfere. I suggest you focus north—let me handle west.
Your neutrality is noted. I will handle France—leave my flank untouched, and we may find common interest later.
Fair enough, I'll bounce you in Galicia again.
Words are cheap. My army is moving to PIE. If you do not divert, MAR and BRE will fall.
Ok that sounds good.
That's fair enough, and you expect me to stay out of yours.
Have fun
I leave Galicia to you. I will not interfere if you leave me to the west.
We may have use for each other later. For now, leave my flank untouched.
Agreed. Focus north—I will not interfere.
Your fleets stay east—ION is mine.
I'll also move to Black Sea again, and I'm going to move Ukraine to Rumania so I'll be able to support you to Bulgaria next spring if you'd like.
PIE is moving. MAR and BRE are next.
What do you mean?
Ok sounds good.
Confirmed. I will leave Galicia to you—focus north, I will handle west.
Sounds good.
Ok sounds good. I'd like to wait until next spring to take Bulgaria.
Ok sure
Your neutrality is noted. If France retaliates, I will not ask for your help—but if you need a clear western flank later, remember I am here.
ION remains mine. Your fleets stay east—no exceptions.
Ok, that's fine by me.
Italy told me that they would be staying in ION and that their fleet in Naples would be staying there. That would mean they're moving their fleet in Venice into Trieste, or at least trying to.
That is very kind of you.

Hey, just a heads up that Italy might be planning on moving its fleet in ION into Trieste, so it might be worth moving your army in Vie to Tri to bounce them out if they try to move there. I haven't heard anything concrete but I would advise against leaving it open.
I'll let you know if I need any help
Fair enough, no exceptions
Have you heard from England?
My options are to divert resources and defend myself. Enjoy getting bogged down in a fight you're not equipped to win.
Thanks for the heads up. I'll be moving there just in case.
A little bit, but not much. What about you?
That's pretty weird for Italy to do that without telling Austria that's what they're doing, but we'll see how this turn plays out.
Cool, just wanted to let you know

I think they are going for Belgium.
If you'd be willing to build in Stp, that would be much appreciated, though I'm not sure if you have any plans to do that this year.
Yeah that's true, we'll just have to wait and see I guess
Any interest in working together against Italy?
Yeah, I think that I'm going to focus on the south for now, but I'm happy to work with you if you need anything.
Has Germany said anything to you? He's not saying much to me.
Have you heard anything from Austria or Italy?
They've been a little quiet but when they speak it's generally in a friendly manner. I'll let you know if I hear anything else from them.
Hey Austria, just thought I'd let you know that Russia has also told me that Italy wants to attack you
Sounds good!
I've heard nothing from Italy and Austria said they're going to move a unit to Trieste. I haven't heard anything about Austria's other plans
Yeah, that sounds good.
I'll see what I can do.
Ok. I guess he's going for Belgium and Holland.
Great
Thanks for the heads up
Yeah, though he might leave one of them empty
Ok, thanks.
Cool, best of luck.
What are your plans for this turn?
Well, we seem to have a WT
